objective: Prepare the OpenCode and Pi adapters so they are fully usable on their target platforms

description: execute() callbacks use 'any' for args/context (biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny). Justified by SDK callback signature but loses type safety; consider deriving param types from schema.
Local 'votes: any[]' array on line 213; could be Vote[] from core since parseVoteFromOutput returns a typed Vote.
Amendment 'payload: any' on line 507; AmendmentPayload union is exported from core and would type the switch arms.
hostId 'pi' adapter declares hasCapability('spawn_agent') as true but spawnAgent() returns an error stub — capability advertisement is inconsistent with implementation.
log() ignores Pi's ExtensionAPI logging (uses console.log unconditionally) while ctx parameter is unused (_pi, _ctx). Opportunity to route through pi.log if available.
Dynamic import of '@guyghost/swarm-dao-core' inside dao_rate (line 540) for addRating — should be lifted to the top-level static import block for consistency and tree-shaking.

issues.description: Ambient type leakage: global interfaces (ToolContentBlock, ToolResult, ToolUpdate, ExtensionCommandContext, PiEventName, BeforeAgentStartEvent, PiEventHandlerResult) declared outside declare module on lines 17-88. Duplicates exist correctly inside declare module @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent (lines 258-338). Remove the ambient declarations.
Stale hasCapability documentation on line 150 claims spawn_agent is reported, but implementation correctly omits it
Dynamic import of addRating inside dao_rate (line 540) should be lifted to top-level static import block
